calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Feb-26-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Heather Sapp for Eric Morris (Petitioner).

The Court noted that there is a preliminary procedural issue of venue, that the notice states that the principal place of administration is Chino Hills and that the declaration is indicating that it is here in San Francisco. The Court also raised the issue of there being no trust over the property during the Trustor's lifetime and that there is a question as whether what the Trustor did is sufficient. Ms. Sapp addressed venue stating that the Decedent was here throughout his life and died here, that the assets are here and that the Attorney is here in San Francisco. Ms. Sapp also stated that the Trustee is so far South and that her office does all of the work, that the Trustee is consenting to have venue here and that the Trustee sometimes signs things. In addition, Ms. Sapp stated that the Decedent was in the process of a divorce, that the Decedent was in the process of splitting up the 401K, but was not allowed to title the assets in the name of the trust and that he passed away before he could do so. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
